title: Traditional Ukrainian Cabbage Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Ukrainian-inspired cabbage stew made with fermented sauerkraut and robust Ukrainian sausage.

ingredients.name: Ukrainian Sausage
ingredients.notes: look for a robust, fermented sausage

instructions: Brown the Ukrainian sausage in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Remove the sausage from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the shredded cabbage to the pot and cook until it starts to wilt, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth, caraway seeds, and bay leaves to the pot.
Return the Ukrainian sausage to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or dill.
